seoTitle: Kalkite vs Kameruka — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kalkite and Kameruka. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kalkite and Kameruka.
heading: Kalkite vs Kameruka — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kalkite, New South Wales and Kameruka, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kameruka has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kalkite (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kalkite or Kameruka safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kalkite has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Kameruka scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kalkite scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Kameruka scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kalkite or Kameruka?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kameruka has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
